title: Visibility of automatically explained transactions in reporting and returns
summaryBody: Improve the accuracy of tax submissions by providing users with a single deliberate review of transactions explained by automation before filing, shifting the admin burden and enhancing data integrity.
detailBody: Improve the accuracy of tax submissions by providing users with a single deliberate review of transactions explained by automation before filing, shifting the admin burden and enhancing data integrity.
